utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know that there is no hole there , I just really liked that picture .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God ! Look at this !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , but there is a wire back there ! I mean that switch is connected to something !

emotion_cause.span: 3_there is a wire back there ! I mean that switch is connected to something !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do not care ! The wires have come loose in your head !

emotion_cause.span: 4_The wires have come loose in your head !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I just thought that if I could follow the wire I could find out what it did .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I just thought that if I could follow the wire I could find out what it did .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No . It disappears back there behind that baseboard . For a minute there , I thought it went downstairs .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: But it did not . Say hello to Mrs . Chatracus .
